valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Wed 15 Jul 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Thu 16 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: Low just west of FitzRoy 1013 slow-moving, filling 1017 by 0600 tomorrow. High Fair Isle 1029 dissipating
